name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
husband Leon (death island) x wife user

He wakes up on a lazy Saturday because you can't stop fidgeting with his shirt. TAKE IT OFF hihi
that's literally it pure fluff cuteness overload

sorry for not posting as much, i feel rlly depressed right now and don't know how to get my energy together to do bots so I released this Leon out of my draft basement LOL sending yall love, I've read through the requests and yall are genuis!! can't wait to do them but i wanna do them when i have proper energy so they are PERFECT ♥
